protocolMismatch.description: Frontend using Socket.IO client, Backend using raw WebSocket server

evidence.frontend: const { io } = await import('socket.io-client'); const socket = io('/terminal')
evidence.backend: const wss = new WebSocket.Server({ server, path: '/terminal' })
evidence.incompatibility: Socket.IO and raw WebSocket are not interoperable protocols

protocolMismatch.impact: Complete communication failure - no messages can pass between frontend and backend

serverStatus.but: Connection established at transport layer but protocol layer incompatible

intendedFlow: Frontend captures data and emits Socket.IO message
PTY output sent back through WebSocket
Frontend receives and displays in terminal
actualFlow: ❌ BREAK: Backend raw WebSocket cannot understand Socket.IO protocol

socketIOProtocol.description: Socket.IO uses its own protocol on top of WebSocket/polling
socketIOProtocol.messageFormat: Engine.IO packet format with Socket.IO namespace handling

rawWebSocketProtocol.description: Raw WebSocket expects plain JSON strings

technicalDeepDive.whyItFails: Socket.IO client sends Engine.IO formatted packets, raw WebSocket server expects plain JSON

previousFixAttempts.pattern: All previous fixes focused on data processing AFTER message reception
previousFixAttempts.missedRootCause: Never validated that messages were actually being received
previousFixAttempts.falsePremise: Assumed communication layer was working, focused on data transformation
previousFixAttempts.debuggingGap: Extensive frontend debugging but no backend message reception validation
